languages.title: Language
languages.subtitle: Choose how the app looks and how the chatbot replies.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your Gmail to continue
login.terms: By continuing, you accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Complete your details and use a Gmail address to recover access.
register.first_names_short: The first names are too short
register.last_names_short: The last names are too short
register.terms: By registering, you accept our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

forgot_password.title: Recover access
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your Gmail and we will send you a verification code.
forgot_password.demo_subtitle: While we connect the real email flow, the code is shown here so you can test the journey.
forgot_password.footer: Use the same Gmail address you used to register your account.

contacts.title: Emergency contacts
contacts.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
contacts.empty_setup: Before entering the app, add at least one trusted contact for your emergency alerts.
contacts.empty_subtitle: Add trusted contacts who will receive your emergency alert.
contacts.form_subtitle: This contact will receive the emergency alert

service.invalid_session: The account did not return a valid session.
service.duplicate_email: An account with that Gmail address already exists.
service.created_without_session: The account was created, but the server did not return an active session.
service.email_not_confirmed: Your account exists, but it still needs confirmation before you can sign in.
service.password_min: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
service.profile_missing: The account exists, but the profile is not configured yet.
service.server_unavailable: Could not connect to the {{appName}} server.

recovery.code_sent: We sent a verification code to {{email}}.
recovery.other_email: The requested code belongs to another email.
recovery.expired: The code has expired. Request a new one.
recovery.code_mismatch: The entered code does not match.
recovery.verified: Code verified successfully. The flow is now ready to connect the real password change.
recovery.verify_error: The code could not be validated. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.about_body: This app is designed to centralize quick help, trusted contacts, and more discreet access depending on the appearance you choose.

appearance.title: App appearance
appearance.avatar_subtitle: These options are generic and only change the profile view.
appearance.theme_subtitle: Choose between light or dark theme according to your preferences.
appearance.launcher_subtitle: Generic presets stay available and you can still use a custom name inside the app.
appearance.custom_name_helper: Leave it empty to use the selected icon name.
appearance.platform_android: On Android, the launcher preset changes the shortcut. The profile icon only stays inside this section.
appearance.platform_other: On this platform the custom name is saved inside the app. The launcher depends on the operating system.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.description: A discreet look, like a calendar app.

notas.title: Notes
notas.description: Clean icon to pass as a notes app.

chatbot.title: Support chatbot
chatbot.intro: Hi, I am your virtual companion. I am here to listen and guide you step by step.
chatbot.support_pet_note: Your virtual pet stays with you here

quick.report: How do I file a report
quick.center: I am looking for a support center

errors.unexpected: An unexpected error happened while asking the chatbot.
errors.missing_key: GROQ_API_KEY is missing. Use flutter_groq.cmd run or add the dart-define to your run configuration.
errors.unusable: Groq did not return a usable response.
errors.unexpected_format: Groq returned a response with an unexpected format.
errors.expected_message: Groq did not return the expected message.

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.subtitle: Fast and safe alert
emergency.tap_to_activate: Tap once to activate the alert
emergency.processing_save_close: Saving video and closing the alert...
emergency.processing_prepare_email: Preparing evidence to send by email...
emergency.unexpected_alert_error: An error happened while preparing the alert.
emergency.dialog_body: The emergency alert has started. Video, audio and location stay active while you keep this alert on. When you stop it, the evidence will be prepared to send by email.
emergency.share_subtitle: Open WhatsApp or share your alert
emergency.record_subtitle: The SOS alert records it automatically. You can also create manual evidence from its module.
emergency.help_subtitle: Direct WhatsApp or share with several contacts
emergency.contacts_empty_subtitle: Add contacts in your profile so you can call them from here
emergency.contacts_empty_snackbar: You do not have emergency contacts configured.
emergency.processing_wait: Please wait while the video is saved and prepared.

education.title: Education
education.subtitle: Sexual and Reproductive Rights
education.results_subtitle: Choose the topic you want to open.
education.topics_subtitle: Each card opens another screen with video, comic and text.
education.empty_subtitle: Try another word to show the education topics again.

detail.video_subtitle: The main video stays on top and changes depending on the chosen topic.
detail.comic_subtitle: The comic is shown fully in vertical format so you can read it by scrolling down.
detail.text_subtitle: At the end we leave space only for reading blocks.
detail.open_video_error: Could not open the sample video.
detail.video_cta_body: This button opens a temporary video so each topic already has a real behavior.

companion.title: Pet and games
companion.games_subtitle: Short sex education lessons to earn food and coins.
companion.pet_subtitle: For now it is stored locally on this device.
companion.no_food_hint: Play to get food and keep raising XP.
companion.hub_loading_body: Enter to see its full status.
companion.hub_ready_body: {{name}} has its own space with games and rewards.

games.title: Education games
games.heading: Myth or fact
games.description: Answer short questions, learn something useful, and earn food or coins to keep caring for the pet.
games.explanation_hint: Tap an option to see the explanation.
games.summary_result: You answered {{correct}} out of {{total}} questions correctly.
games.idea_1: Consent is communicated and can change.
games.idea_2: Reliable information helps you decide before acting.
games.idea_3: Asking for support is part of self-care.
games.save_reward_error: The game reward could not be saved.
